title: crepidium retusum
intro: Crepidium retusum, also known as the retuse crepidium, is a species of terrestrial orchid found in Central and South America, particularly in Costa Rica and Ecuador. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepidium retusum are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
